plan_metadata.name: DA Add Action Import Existing API Basic API Key

steps.description: Type the OpenAPI specification URL into the "Enter OpenAPI Description Document URL" input field in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Press Enter to confirm the URL input in the "OpenAPI Description Document" address bar in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "OK" button in the "Select Operation(s) Copilot Can Interact with" dialog at the top of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the blue "Clear All" button in the dropdown for operation selection within the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension in Visual Studio Code, to deselect all chosen APIs.
Click the "Default folder" option in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select '/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects' as the project location in Visual Studio Code.
Type the text 'faketestvalue' into the "Enter API Key in OpenAPI Description Document" secure input field in the Visual Studio Code interface.
Press the 'Enter' key to confirm entry of the API key in the "Enter API Key in OpenAPI Description Document" input dialog within Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Confirm" button in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit API key upload confirmation dialog at the top center of the Visual Studio Code interface. The button is highlighted with a red crosshair for precise targeting.
